query:
SELECT s.id, s.buyerName, s.saleValue, s.brokerVendedor, s.brokerAngariador, c.commissionValue, c.status 
FROM sales s 
LEFT JOIN commissions c ON s.id = c.saleId 
WHERE s.companyId IN (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE name LIKE '%Baggio%') 
LIMIT 10;
